title: XLands
body:
XLands is a dimension overhaul mod, which adds a new dimension, with 2 biomes. You can find them in the wiki.
It adds new tools, weapons, armors. Theres a new wood in the new dimension, called XWood. It adds a food, XFruit. Added a fun liquid too, called XLiquid. You can obtain it by clicking with a bucket.

If you want new experience, you should try this mod
